description:
Analyze the SMTP capture file at /home/ga/Documents/captures/smtp.pcap and generate a forensics report at /home/ga/Documents/smtp_report.txt. The report must contain the following fields, each on its own line in the format 'field_name: value': total_packets (total packets in capture), smtp_packets (SMTP protocol packets), sender (email address from MAIL FROM without brackets or prefixes), recipient (email address from RCPT TO without brackets or prefixes), smtp_server_ip (IPv4 of the host sending the 220 greeting), and smtp_client_ip (IPv4 of the host initiating the connection). Wireshark is already open with the capture file loaded.

Example format:
total_packets: 42
smtp_packets: 20
sender: user@example.com
recipient: target@example.com
smtp_server_ip: 192.168.1.1
smtp_client_ip: 192.168.1.2
